mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: OmniCare was born from the desire to facilitate access to healthcare in Tunisia. We believe everyone should be able to consult a healthcare professional easily, wherever they are.

vision.description: To become the leading telemedicine platform in Tunisia, offering quality services accessible to all.
